definitions: to mark or cut the surface of something with a sharp object
to rub an itchy part of one's body with one's nails or a sharp object
to remove something by scraping it away
to withdraw from a competition or race
to make a harsh, grating sound
examples: He managed to scratch the paintwork.
I need to scratch this mosquito bite.
She tried to scratch the label off the bottle.
The horse had to scratch from the race.
The old record began to scratch loudly.
